seoTitle: How to Pay With PayPal on AliExpress (2026)
metaDescription: Learn how to check out on AliExpress with PayPal, including why availability can vary by supplier and shipping destination.
intro: PayPal availability on AliExpress depends on the specific supplier's store settings and your shipping destination, so it's worth checking before you rely on it. This guide walks through selecting PayPal at checkout when it's supported. It's for shoppers who prefer not to enter card details directly on international storefronts.

steps.heading: Add items to your cart
steps.body: Browse AliExpress, add your selected items to the cart, and click Checkout.

steps.heading: Check the payment methods panel
steps.body: Open the Payment Methods section to see if PayPal is listed as an option for your specific order.

steps.heading: Select PayPal
steps.body: Choose the PayPal radio button and click Place Order or Continue to trigger the checkout script.

steps.heading: Log in through the secure overlay
steps.body: A PayPal browser window will open; enter your credentials, pass multi-factor checks, and pick your funding source.

steps.heading: Confirm currency and finish
steps.body: Review the total for any currency conversion charges, then click Agree & Continue to complete your order.

faq.question: Why doesn't PayPal show up for every AliExpress order?
faq.answer: PayPal availability depends on the individual supplier's store settings and can vary by shipping destination.

faq.question: Are there extra fees when paying with PayPal internationally?
faq.answer: Currency conversion charges may apply depending on your account settings and the seller's listed currency.

faq.question: Is my order tracked the same way when paying with PayPal?
faq.answer: Yes, your order confirmation and tracking work the same regardless of payment method, and transaction invoices are saved for buyer protection.

faq.question: What if PayPal checkout fails midway?
faq.answer: Try refreshing the page and reselecting your payment method, since temporary connectivity issues can interrupt the secure overlay.
